nasb.text: The Son of Man will send forth His angels, and they will gather out of His kingdom all stumbling blocks, and those who commit lawlessness,

esv.text: The Son of Man will send his angels, and they will gather out of his kingdom all causes of sin and all law-breakers,

cnv.text: 那時，人子要差派他的使者，把一切使人犯罪的事和不法之徒，從他的國中拔掉，

ccb.text: 人子也将派天使把一切引人犯罪和作孽的人从祂国里挑出来，

csbs.text: 人子要差派他的天使们，从他的国度里挑出来所有绊脚的和作恶的，
